label: Feature-sliced — enthusiast
summary: Organize by feature slices (App → Pages → Features → Entities → Shared). Start with App, Pages, and Features.

layerDescriptions.App: App shell — providers, routing, global styles.
layerDescriptions.Widgets: Large UI blocks built from features and entities.
layerDescriptions.Shared: Buttons, utils, and UI kit with no business knowledge.
